requirement_topic.en: UN 38.3 transport safety and Thailand logistics requirements for lithium batteries
requirement_topic.zh: 锂电池UN 38.3运输安全及泰国物流要求
requirement_topic.zht: 鋰電池UN 38.3運輸安全及泰國物流要求

summary.en: Lithium batteries and power banks are dangerous goods for transport and require UN 38.3 transport test support before shipment. For Thailand-facing logistics, documentation and labeling practices must support entry handling at Thai customs and consignee networks, with Laem Chabang and Bangkok as main handling points. UN 3480 and UN 3481 classification logic remains central, with packaging, marking, and transport declaration expectations applying to air and sea modes.
summary.zh: 锂电池与移动电源属危险品，通常需要UN 38.3运输测试支持作为出运前条件。面向泰国物流时，文件与标签应支持泰国清关及收货网络，洛美占与曼谷通常是主要处理口岸。UN 3480和UN 3481分类逻辑为核心，空运和海运均需按危险品包装、标识和运输申报要求执行。
summary.zht: 鋰電池與行動電源屬危險品，通常需要UN 38.3運輸測試支持作為出運前條件。面向泰國物流時，文件與標籤應支持泰國清關及收貨網絡，洛美占與曼谷通常是主要處理口岸。UN 3480和UN 3481分類邏輯為核心，空運和海運均需依危險品包裝、標識與運輸申報要求執行。

standards_or_laws: UN Manual of Tests and Criteria, Part III, Section 38.3 — Lithium batteries
UN 3480 and UN 3481 transport class logic for lithium cells and batteries
UNECE dangerous-goods implementation standards applied in Thailand logistics handling

summary.en: China also applies UN 38.3 as the principal transport baseline for lithium shipments under civil aviation and dangerous-goods handling channels. For air and sea movements, this is largely common practice, but document format and destination-country transport administration can differ at customs and post-arrival review stages.
summary.zh: 中国在空运和危险品运输渠道中同样以UN 38.3作为主要运输合规基线。空运和海运层面通常与国际规则一致，但泰国侧清关、运输文件格式和后续监管环节仍可能有差异。
summary.zht: 中國在空運和危險品運輸渠道中同樣以UN 38.3作為主要運輸合規基線。空運和海運層面通常與國際規則一致，但泰國側清關、運輸文件格式和後續監管環節仍可能有差異。

standards_or_laws: GB 31241-2022 — lithium battery baseline standard context
CAAC provisions for dangerous goods transport channels
UN 38.3 requirements in global logistics and dangerous goods operations

gap.en: The test method baseline is usually carried over from China, but Thailand-facing transport documentation must reflect local receiving logistics workflows and declaration expectations. Practical gaps include port handover format, consignee/importer information consistency, and evidence filing in trade documents that align with Thai customs channels.
gap.zh: 测试方法基线通常可沿用中国资料，但泰国端运输文件需按当地物流流程和申报习惯重组。实际差距在于口岸交接资料格式、收货方与进口商一致性信息、以及符合泰国清关渠道的单据归集。
gap.zht: 測試方法基線通常可沿用中國資料，但泰國端運輸文件需按當地物流流程和申報習慣重組。實際差距在於口岸交接資料格式、收貨方與進口商一致性信息、以及符合泰國清關渠道的單據歸集。

mandatory_status.target: Mandatory transport baseline for all lithium categories; Thai logistics compliance is mandatory at shipment handover and import entry.
mandatory_status.cn: Mandatory in China for applicable domestic transport channels; UN 38.3 is common baseline but not a substitute for Thai entry documentation.

source.publisher: UNECE/UN transport dangerous goods framework and relevant air/sea implementation references

compliance_verdict.en: [INFORMATIONAL] Assume UN 38.3 remains mandatory and transport evidence should be retained. For Thailand, additional review should focus on destination-document formatting, consignee/importer traceability, and port-side logistics flow through Laem Chabang and Bangkok.
compliance_verdict.zh: [仅供参考] UN 38.3通常为必需条件，应保留完整测试与运输证据。到泰国阶段应重点检查目的地文件格式、收货/进口方可追溯信息以及洛美占、曼谷口岸的物流流程衔接。
compliance_verdict.zht: [僅供參考] UN 38.3通常為必需條件，應保留完整測試與運輸證據。到泰國階段應重點檢查目的地文件格式、收貨/進口方可追溯信息及洛美占、曼谷口岸的物流流程銜接。
